creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
Hello,

according to your webpage your are providing internet/phone access to 
your customers.  But there is no information on your side that you 
either provide hosting or consulting support for FreeBSD on your web site.

So even if you are using FreeBSD internally (again no information on the 
website) this unfortunately does not match the criteria to be included 
in the list (which would be:  "FreeBSD available to customers or FreeBSD 
consulting).  Meaning I will close this report for now.

Regards.

jkois

-- 
  Johann Kois
  jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
  FreeBSD Documentation Project
  FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
